Module org.eclipse.persistence.jpa
Package org.eclipse.persistence.internal.jpa.metadata.accessors.classes

Class PackageAccessor

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.persistence.internal.jpa.metadata.ORMetadata
org.eclipse.persistence.internal.jpa.metadata.accessors.MetadataAccessor
org.eclipse.persistence.internal.jpa.metadata.accessors.classes.PackageAccessor
public class PackageAccessor extends MetadataAccessor
An package-info accessor.

    INTERNAL: The pre-process method is called during regular deployment and metadata processing and will pre-process the items of interest on an package-info.
